name: Qessah
description: A warm oriental fragrance with spicy richness and creamy vanilla. Smooth, luxurious, and perfect for evening wear.
story: Qessah (meaning 'Story' in Arabic) is a rich, majestic oriental fragrance. Precious saffron and warm spices are beautifully softened by creamy vanilla and smooth sandalwood, telling a tale of heritage and timeless elegance.

name: Valley Elite
description: Rich tobacco wrapped in sweet vanilla and cacao. Deep, addictive, and incredibly comforting with excellent longevity.
story: Created for the elite who command respect. Valley Elite evokes the atmosphere of a lush, green valley under a golden sun, expressing absolute sophistication and success.

name: Y Vision
description: Fresh, clean, and versatile. An energetic everyday scent that feels modern, confident, and easy to wear.
story: Designed for the visionary who turns dreams into reality. Y Vision is the fragrance of achievement, representing the drive, passion, and elegance of the modern gentleman.

name: Aeon
description: A refined blend of tobacco, woods, and vanilla. Sophisticated, smooth, and perfect for those who enjoy niche-style fragrances.
story: Inspired by the concept of eternity, AEON represents a timeless moment captured in fragrance. Each note has been carefully selected to create a sensory journey that evolves throughout the day.

name: Coco Shore
description: Creamy coconut meets sunny florals and soft vanilla. Tropical, relaxing, and effortlessly uplifting.
story: Inspired by the pristine white sands of a tropical paradise at golden hour. Coco Shore evokes the sensation of warm sun on the skin and the gentle rustle of palm trees.

name: Libre Soul
description: Fresh lavender blended with sensual vanilla and white florals. Elegant, feminine, and timeless.
story: Designed for the modern, free-spirited soul who lives by their own rules. A perfect balance of masculine strength and feminine grace, embodying pure luxury and confidence.

name: Scandal
description: Bold, sweet, and unforgettable. The honey-caramel combination creates a seductive and attention-grabbing scent trail.
story: Born to cause a stir, Scandal is a fragrance of contrast — elegant by day, wild and sensual by night. It is a playful yet sophisticated scent that leaves a trail of intrigue.

name: Silver Sahar
description: A powerful aromatic fragrance with spicy freshness and smooth woods. Strong, masculine, and long-lasting.
story: Inspired by the cool, crystal-clear streams flowing through the majestic mountains at dawn. Silver Sahara represents purity, freshness, and the modern explorer's spirit.

name: Kirke Moon
description: Juicy fruits layered over a luxurious musky base. Vibrant, addictive, and a guaranteed compliment magnet.
story: Inspired by the sorceress Circe and the celestial light of the moon. Kirke Moon is a mysterious, hypnotic scent that captivates anyone who crosses its path.

name: Elixir Gold
description: Sweet vanilla, rich honey, and smooth tobacco create an irresistible scent. Powerful, sexy, and perfect for making an impression.
story: Designed to capture the essence of liquid gold, this fragrance represents wealth, power, and prestige. It is a powerful, long-lasting scent that leaves a memorable, warm trail.

name: Opium Night
description: A seductive blend of rich coffee and creamy vanilla with soft white florals. Sweet, addictive, and perfect for nights out or special occasions.
story: Inspired by the thrilling energy of a midnight adventure. Opium Night is designed for the modern woman who is glamorous, rebellious, and effortlessly seductive.
